faq.title: Frequently Asked
faq.subtitle: Answers to the most common questions

items.question: Can I try the system for free?
items.answer: Yes! We offer a 14-day free trial without requiring a credit card. You can explore all features during this period.

items.question: Does the system support Saudi VAT?
items.answer: Yes, the system is fully compliant with ZATCA requirements. It supports electronic invoice issuance, automatic VAT calculation, and tax return preparation.

items.question: Can I import my data from another system?
items.answer: Absolutely! We provide easy import tools that support Excel and CSV files. Our support team can also help you migrate data from any other accounting system.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes, we use the latest encryption technologies (SSL/TLS) to protect your data. All data is stored in secure data centers with automatic daily backups.

items.question: Can I upgrade or downgrade my plan later?
items.answer: Yes, you can change your plan anytime from your account settings. When upgrading, the difference will be calculated proportionally. When downgrading, the change takes effect from the next billing period.

items.question: Does the system support multiple branches?
items.answer: Yes, in the Retail plan and above. You can manage multiple branches with separate warehouses, different permissions per branch, and unified or detailed reports per branch.

items.question: How does technical support work?
items.answer: We provide technical support through multiple channels: email, live chat, and phone for higher-tier plans. We also offer a comprehensive knowledge base and tutorial videos.

items.question: Does the POS system work offline?
items.answer: Yes, the POS system supports offline mode. Operations will be saved locally and automatically synced when the connection is restored.
